EXPLANATION: The paper exists with its own dedicated OpenReview page and appears in Bareinboim's official CV and lab page, confirming it was published at NeurIPS 2025 (39th Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems) with authors Min Woo Park, Andy Arditi, Elias Bareinboim, and Sanghack Lee — exactly matching the cited reference.
LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=3aFwsZxM5H
FOUND_TITLE: Structural Causal Bandits under Markov Equivalence
FOUND_AUTHORS: Min Woo Park, Andy Arditi, Elias Bareinboim, Sanghack Lee
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
